nasb.text: idolatry, sorcery, enmities, strife, jealousy, outbursts of anger, disputes, dissensions, factions,

esv.text: idolatry, sorcery, enmity, strife, jealousy, fits of anger, rivalries, dissensions, divisions,

cnv.text: 拜偶像、行邪術、仇恨、爭競、忌恨、忿怒、自私、分黨、結派、

ccb.text: 拜偶像、行邪术、仇恨、争吵、忌恨、恼怒、纷争、冲突、分裂、

csbs.text: 拜偶像、行邪术、仇恨、纷争、嫉恨、暴怒、争竞、分裂、结派、
